title: prunus × fruticans
intro: Prunus × fruticans, also known as the rock rose or white rockrose, is a shrub-like plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic content. The health benefits of Prunus × fruticans include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Prunus × fruticans can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves for topical application, and is also used as a natural dye and in traditional medicine.
